meta.title: Pricing — Plans & Access
meta.description: Simple, transparent pricing. Choose the plan that fits your needs.

hero.title: Pricing
hero.description: Clear, straightforward plans with no hidden fees. Get started today.

paragraphs: Setting up your account is quick and straightforward. Follow the steps below to get started.
Once your account is active, you'll have access to all features included in your chosen plan.
bullets: Create your account with a valid email address
Choose the plan that fits your needs
Access all features immediately after setup
Contact support anytime if you need assistance
loginGuide.conclusion: Getting started takes just a few minutes. Our team is available to help you through the setup process whenever needed.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Simply create an account, choose your plan, and complete the verification process. You'll have access within minutes.

items.question: Can I change my plan later?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect at the start of the next billing cycle.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: We offer a trial period so you can explore all features before committing. No credit card required.

items.question: How does billing work?
items.answer: Billing is monthly or annual depending on the plan you choose. Annual plans include a discount compared to monthly billing.
